name: EB OE TS.Z./ZUMTOBEL
summary: EB OE TS.Z./ZUMTOBEL is a tracker certificate linked to Zumtobel Group AG, an Austrian company specializing in lighting solutions. The company develops, produces, and distributes lighting systems, luminaires, and lighting management systems for indoor and outdoor applications. The certificate allows investors to participate in the performance of Zumtobel's stock.
